Wake up.
Look around. There's nothing here but white.
Take a step.
Look at your own claw hands.
Walk forward a little more.
A soccer ball appears. Kick it.
A red baseball cap drops down. Put it on.
Walk a few steps to the left and come back with a skateboard.
Try to skateboard.
A small plastic dog walks in. Pet it.
A pair of sunglasses. Put them on over the cap.
Walk off-screen and come back with a hammer.
Swing the hammer at nothing.
A potted plastic plant appears. Set it down next to you.
Moonwalk like Michael Jackson.
A banana lands on the ground. Step on it on purpose.
A tiny harmonica appears. Try to play it with claw hands.
A baseball bat. Take a practice swing.
A cardboard box drops down. Stand inside it.
Pop your head off, toss it up, catch it.
A skateboard ramp appears. Try to hit it.
Flex your muscles.
Do the worm on the floor.
Pick up the soccer ball again and kick it harder.
If the cap fell off during that, put it back on.
A pie appears in your hand. Take a bite — you can't actually eat it.
Break-dance.
Try to do a push-up. Struggle with it.
A hula hoop appears. Try to hula hoop.
The dog comes back. Throw the soccer ball for it.
Pop your hair piece off and swap it out for the cap.
A small trampoline appears. Jump on it.
Try a backflip off the trampoline.
Walk off-screen and come back dressed as a cowboy.
Draw an imaginary pistol. Fire it.
Grab the skateboard again. Try an ollie.
Fall over.
A tiny chair appears. Sit in it.
Try to cross your legs. They don't bend — just sit stiffly.
Pop your leg off, click it back on sideways, fall over.
Take a bow to an imaginary audience.
A helicopter hat appears. Put it on.
Try to use the helicopter hat to hover. It does not work.
Walk off-screen and come back with a microphone.
Pretend to sing — but no sound. Just the motion.
Do the moonwalk again, but this time wearing the sunglasses.
A skateboard and a helmet appear. Put the helmet on, ride the board.
Pop the helmet off at the worst possible moment.
A bowling pin appears. Knock it down with the hammer.
Try to stack all the bowling pins you've collected. You only have one.
Kick the soccer ball toward an imaginary goal.
A tiny car appears. Try to fit inside it.
It's too small. Disassemble the car into bricks.
Rebuild the bricks into a stool. Sit on it.
The dog is back. Put the sunglasses on the dog.
A small disco floor appears under your feet. Groove.
A mirror ball appears overhead. Keep grooving.
A tiny plastic robot dog appears next to the real dog.
Both dogs sit.
Do the worm again — but better, and end in a pose.
A boombox appears. Turn it on.
Dance to the boombox.
The boombox dies mid-song.
A stack of loose LEGO bricks appears. Build something tall.
Climb what you built.
Fall off.
Your arm pops off in the fall. Click it back on.
A giant magnet appears. It drags you sideways across the floor.
Grab the hammer again and swing it at the magnet.
A swarm of tiny plastic butterflies flutters in. Try to catch one.
Catch one. Study it up close.
A boxing glove on a spring launches out of nowhere. Dodge.
Dodge right into the cardboard box from earlier.
Pop up out of the box wearing a different hat.
A small rain cloud appears directly above you.
An umbrella drops down. Open it.
Walk off-screen and come back with a guitar.
Pretend to shred the guitar.
Bring the trampoline back and shred while jumping.
The dog climbs up onto the trampoline with you.
A party hat appears. Put it on over whatever you're already wearing.
Every prop from earlier appears around you in a pile.
Take a bow again.
Kick the original soccer ball one more time.
Yawn. Stretch.
Lie down in the white void. The props fade. Sleep.
Wake back up. The void is empty again — but the hat is still on your head.
Look around, surprised.
Take one last step forward. The clip ends.
